highlights.text: My general lean is always to defer to the trend.
My lean was they would be able to.
I wrote Monday at 4pm: “In a strong bull case tomorrow though, ES won’t even backtest 6952.
Bear case discussed above.” Overnight, we got a little above 7036, then pulled back.
As I’ve also specified at length, insitutions in ES buy these dips in a very particular way: Via my core setup, the Failed Breakdown.
As always, this trap down would setup a strong squeeze, but only on the Failed Breakdown.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll go over today’s Failed Breakdowns (these are key to know), and I’ll discuss the actionable plan for tomorrow.
Next slate of targets are 6997, 7014, 7032, 7049.” We trapped below 6982 Monday evening, then we ran nicely to 7014+ yesterday.

post_title: Major Earnings Incoming For SPX. Will They Ruin The Rally? January 29 Plan
